steps.title: Identify the sign of each side
steps.content: Since a square of a real number is always non‑negative, $$\left(x+64\right)^2 \ge 0$$ for every real $x$.

steps.title: Conclude number of real solutions
steps.content:
The right‑hand side is $$-100$$, which is negative.
A non‑negative quantity can never equal a negative number, so the equation has no real solution.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
